title: Prasophyllum robustum

It is a type of terrestrial orchid, which is a common classification for plants within the Prasophyllum genus. The species Prasophyllum robustum is often found in moist, temperate environments and is typically characterized by its robust growth. The classification of Prasophyllum robustum is further specified at the species level within the broader taxonomy of the orchid family.
